sections.paragraph:
(prop. inf. of the verb רָבַב), in the later books also fully רֹוב Job 35:9 Est 10:3 followed by Makk. רָב־ with suff. רֻבָּם-

(1) multitude, abundance, Lev 25:16 Isa 1:11. לָרֹב adv. much, Gen 30:30 48:16 Deu 1:10. Pl. const. Hos 8:12 קרי. Poet. multitude is almost used for כֹּל Job 4:14 (see Schultens on loc. cit.); 33:19 .

(2) greatness, e.g. of might, Psa 33:16 of pity, Psa 51:3 length of way, Jos 9:13.
